UADataType.Description: USD token value represented as a UA String subtype.
USD asset path represented as a UA String subtype.
USD time code represented as a UA Double subtype.
USD color3f value (RGB float triple); UA Float subtype carried as a 3-element Float array.
USD normal3f value (float triple); UA Float subtype carried as a 3-element Float array.
USD point3f value (float triple); UA Float subtype carried as a 3-element Float array.
USD vector3f value (float triple); UA Float subtype carried as a 3-element Float array.
USD texCoord2f value (float pair); UA Float subtype carried as a 2-element Float array.
USD quatf value (float quaternion); UA Float subtype carried as a 4-element Float array.
USD quatd value (double quaternion); UA Double subtype carried as a 4-element Double array.
USD matrix4d value (row-major); UA Double subtype carried as a 16-element Double array.

UAReferenceType.Description: Browsable relationship edge from a prim or relationship to its target prim.

UAVariableType.Description: USD attribute value variable. The runtime DataType and ValueRank reflect the composed Sdf value type.

UAVariable.Description: True if the attribute is a custom USD attribute.
Interpolation metadata for primvars and similar authored values.

UAObjectType.Description: A materialized composed USD prim (untyped/over base).

UAObject.Description: Composed root prims of the materialized stage.
Child prims of this composed prim.

UAVariable.Description: USD attributes authored on this prim.

UAObject.Description: USD relationships authored on this prim.
Applied API schema AddIns for this prim.
Composition arcs contributing to this prim.
Variant sets authored or composed for this prim.
Arbitrary metadata Property variables for this prim.

UAVariable.Description: True if this is a custom relationship.
Ordered SdfPath target strings for fidelity.
Variant set name for variant arcs.

UAObjectType.Description: Abstract base for applied USD API schema AddIns.

UAObject.Description: Variant sets available on this prim.
